issues.sample: I own an Audi 2015 S5 Cabriolet. I bought this new from Strong Audi in Salt Lake City.  On September 2, 2022, I was driving it on I 15 south of Provo UT.  I was in the middle of 5 lanes of traffic all driving approximately 80/miles per hour.   Suddenly, the engine shut down. Than

narrative.headline: What 2015 Audi S5 owners report most
